data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding peak vs off-peak booking windows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Peak vs off-peak booking windows'. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation or validation of this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature but lacks concrete evidence of its functionality or validation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation or validation of peak vs off-peak booking windows.
